title: Meeting Action Items
description: Action items extracted from meeting transcript dialogue. Identifies specific, trackable commitments made by speakers.

action_item_count.description: Total number of action items found in the transcript

meeting_date.description: Meeting date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or 'UNKNOWN' if not stated in the transcript

participants.description: Participants ordered by speaking frequency based ONLY on transcript dialogue

speaking_count.description: Approximate number of speaking turns in the transcript

action_items.description: Specific, trackable action items extracted from transcript dialogue. Must pass the core test: is this a concrete task that could be tracked to completion?

title.description: Up to 15-word plain description of the action. No prefixes.

summary.description: Concise summary of the action (up to 15 words). If assigned to someone other than Haje, start with their first name followed by a colon (e.g. 'Sarah: send the report to the team').

description.description: 1-2 tight paragraphs. First: the exact commitment (direct quote or close paraphrase). Second (if useful): the surrounding context — why this came up, what problem it solves, or what was agreed. No waffle. Enough to reconstruct the situation weeks later without re-reading the transcript.

discussion_point.description: Topic for future 1:1 discussion. 2-3 sentences. Start with '(as discussed in [meeting name])'

slack_message.description: 2-3 sentence friendly Slack reminder with action, deadline, and context. Do NOT include the person's name.

mentioned_in_context.description: Timestamp or dialogue excerpt showing where the action item appears
